violations.text: Thermometer is lacking in the 2-door refrigerator. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025

The floor in the dry storage cabinet has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings in closet using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize to monitor new activity. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control as frequently as needed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

Pest droppings were observed on the floor in the dry storage closet. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using proper methods of cleaning. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Corrective Action - PIC has Food Safety Manager Training but is not a registered Food Safety Manager with the RIDOH. PIC is to submit required paper work to DOH to register. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023
